name: OasisEraEditor_demo1_Project
observations: Scope: demo1 OasisEraEditor Lua project. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / ShadowTrackerExtra demo1. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Only modify files under Script/; treat Asset, Source, LuaHelper, Manual, Navmesh, and API docs as read-only reference material.

Scope: demo1 PVE architecture. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / current demo1 branch. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: The project follows Plan A: player fire skill -> mob spawning -> OnAllMobDie -> Boss countdown UI -> Boss travel/teleport -> optional mob loop restart.

Scope: demo1 implementation workflow. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / current demo1 branch. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Keep runtime logic in Script/ and centralized gameplay switches in Script/Common/pve_config.lua; prefer changing config flags before refactoring flow code.

Scope: demo1 monster chain. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / Ancient Stone template chain. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Current monster chain uses BP_MyAI_Spawner inheriting from BP_CH_UGC_AncientStone; do not revert to the old hand-built MyAI chain or silently switch to v2.

Scope: demo1 debugging workflow. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / DS-client test flow. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: For server-authoritative gameplay, inspect DS logs and Client LuaLog separately; many spawner, countdown, and clear events only print on DS.

name: OasisEraEditor_demo1_DocDrift
observations: Scope: Oasis Lua replication. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / Lua network bridge. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: GetReplicatedProperties() must return multiple string values, not a Lua table, e.g. return "BossCountdown", "BossChallengeActive".

Scope: Oasis Lua RPC registration. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / Lua network bridge. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: GetAvailableServerRPCs() must return multiple RPC name values, not one comma-joined string; otherwise client RPC calls may not register or dispatch.

Scope: Ancient Stone attack animation setup. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / BP_CH_UGC_AncientStone template. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Adding UGC.Monster.Hit to AnimListComp extended animations does not automatically make attacks play; official Ancient Stone attacks rely on skill sequence/animation track behavior.

Scope: engine skill assets. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / Repository engine assets. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: PESkill_UGC_AncientStone_Attack is an engine/Repository read-only skill; custom attack timing or animation changes require copying it into project assets first.

Scope: monster death animation setup. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / GenericCharacter monster animation. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Death animation should use a montage in the proper death tag/slot; None or a plain sequence not playing is expected behavior.

Scope: Ancient Stone death montage replay. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / current logs. Confidence: medium. ExecutableConclusion: If death montage appears to play twice, inspect Client logs for both BroadcastClientsDeath and PawnState.Dead OnRep triggering PlayAnimMontage; treat as possible engine/template behavior and verify after version changes.

name: OasisEraEditor_demo1_ExecutableRecipes
observations: Scope: module 3 spawner closure. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / demo1 permanent-level workflow. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Place mob spawner point instances and a spawner manager instance in the permanent level; set points to manager-controlled, configure monster type/count on points, reference points from manager waves, then verify OnMobSpawn and OnAllMobDie.

Scope: spawner configuration ownership. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / AUGCMobSpawnerManager. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: In demo1, monster class/count are configured on the spawner point, not in Lua and not necessarily on the manager; the manager schedules waves and references points.

Scope: manager without monster blueprint. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / AUGCMobSpawner logs. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: A manager can spawn mobs without directly configuring a monster blueprint because AUGCMobSpawner::SpawnMob reads MobClass from the referenced spawner point instance.

Scope: clear -> countdown -> loop restart. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / demo1 loop implementation. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Waiting for UI countdown before restarting mobs is custom code flow: OnAllMobDie -> StartBossChallenge -> server countdown -> ResetSpawnerManager + StartSpawnerManager, not an internal wave condition.

Scope: module 4 independent UI test. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / demo1 DS-client timing. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: For independent countdown UI testing, start the DS countdown only after client TryInitMainUI succeeds and sends a dev RPC; fixed 3s/30s delays can expire before the client UI exists.

Scope: Boss countdown authority. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / UGCGameState replication. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Boss countdown should be server-authoritative replicated state; UI displays BossChallengeActive/BossCountdown and must not drive timer logic.

Scope: module 5 Boss travel. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / Plan A two-map flow. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Minimal Boss entry chain is UI01 button -> RequestTravelToBossMap RPC -> DS cancels countdown -> travel/teleport using pve_config.MAP_BOSS.

name: OasisEraEditor_demo1_EditorUIFacts
observations: Scope: mob spawner manager wave UI. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / AUGCMobSpawnerManager details panel. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Wave start condition only offering All Mob Die and Last Wave End is normal; it controls when the next wave starts, not when the manager starts.

Scope: spawner point reference selection. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / permanent level setup. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Configure wave spawner point references on the placed manager instance, not class defaults; if selection reverts to None, check same level layer, manager-control mode, and whether the target is a placed spawner point instance.

Scope: current level workflow. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / demo1. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: The user configured spawning in the permanent level; future guidance should start from the permanent-level workflow, not assume a fresh Map01 setup.

Scope: TimeUI widget naming. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / demo1 UI01-TimeUI. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: In TimeUI, TextBlock_1 is the countdown number and LastTime is the static label 'LastTime:'; countdown updates must target TextBlock_1, not LastTime.

Scope: Lua-bound UI widgets. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / UUserWidget Lua binding. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: UI01 and TimeUI widget variables must match Lua field names exactly and be marked Is Variable; otherwise Lua may run while widgets do not display/update.

Scope: hidden UI diagnosis. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / UMG workflow. Confidence: medium. ExecutableConclusion: If Lua updates a widget but it remains invisible, inspect visibility, z-order/layer, alpha, and blueprint animations or other logic that may force Hidden/Collapsed.

name: OasisEraEditor_demo1_AgentPitfalls
observations: Scope: spawner explanation. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / demo1. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Do not tell the user the manager must configure monster type; in demo1 the spawner point owns monster type/count and the manager references points.

Scope: wave callbacks. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / AUGCMobSpawnerManager. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Do not confuse OnWaveEnd or OnAllWaveEnd with OnAllMobDie; demo1 clear logic should key from OnAllMobDie because OnAllWaveEnd can occur while mobs are still alive.

Scope: skill duration terminology. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / PersistEffect skill system. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Do not explain skill ApplyTime/effective duration -1 as attack animation duration; it is the skill mount lifetime, not a single CastSkill playback duration.

Scope: engine skill modification. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / Repository skill assets. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Do not instruct direct edits to PESkill_UGC_AncientStone_Attack; copy to a project-local skill asset before modifying animation tracks or sequence timing.

Scope: death animation handling. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / GenericCharacter death flow. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Do not add PlayAnimMontage in BPDie for death when AnimList/engine death flow already handles it; this can increase duplicate playback.

Scope: module 4 UI debugging. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / DS-client startup timing. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Do not infer UI failure from DS countdown success alone; compare DS countdown timing with client TryInitMainUI and OnRep timing.

Scope: Oasis guidance workflow. LastVerified: 2026-06-09. ApplicableVersion: OasisEraEditor 2001776 / user preference. Confidence: high. ExecutableConclusion: Before giving Oasis editor/Lua steps, check local docs, LuaHelper, current code, and logs; separate verified facts from guesses because docs may lag the editor.
